name: Moving Blocks
author: Poki
description: Moving Blocks is a puzzle game that’s all about smart moves and sharp thinking! Your goal is to slide all the blocks into the right spots. But here’s the twist: they all move at the same time! Plan your moves carefully to avoid blocking yourself and getting stuck. Stuck on a tricky level? Use the hint button for a little nudge. Can you master the movement and solve them all? Let’s get sliding! How to play Moving Blocks? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move. Who created Moving Blocks? Moving Blocks is created by Delfino. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Moving Blocks for free? You can play Moving Blocks for free on Poki. Can I play Moving Blocks on mobile devices and desktop? Moving Blocks can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
